## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] workflow or install path checked when relevant
- [ ] PR output reviewed when decision/comment behavior changed

## Product Impact

- [ ] introduced-risk behavior changed
- [ ] policy behavior changed
- [ ] reporting/comment output changed
- [ ] docs/site changed

## Notes

Call out any decision-model, policy, or public-surface implications.
